FutureEnergySection.header: Innovative Energy Solutions for the Future
FutureEnergySection.description: Discover how our solutions are revolutionizing the way we interact with energy

solution1.title: Generate Your Own Energy
solution1.subtitle: Reduce Energy Bills
solution1.description: With our solar, wind, and BIPV solutions, you can generate your own electricity anywhere and significantly reduce your energy bill costs.

solution2.title: Clean Energy
solution2.subtitle: Contribute to Environmental Care
solution2.description: By choosing our solar panel technologies, wind energy, and photovoltaic glass, you'll be using 100% renewable and clean energy sources.

solution3.title: Innovation in Generation Systems
solution3.subtitle: Cutting-Edge Technologies
solution3.description: Green is a leader in offering innovative products, such as photovoltaic glass and solar tiles, that combine high-efficiency solar energy and incorporate it into building construction elements.

solution4.title: Increase Property Value
solution4.subtitle: Better Return on Investment (ROI)
solution4.description: Properties with renewable energy systems, such as solar panels, wind energy, or photovoltaic tiles, increase their value and attractiveness in the market, ensuring a higher and faster return on investment. Thanks to distributed energy, the guaranteed return on investment in the system is between 5 and 10 years.

solution5.title: Energy Independence
solution5.subtitle: Total Control Over Your Energy Consumption
solution5.description: With our solutions, you can reduce your dependence on electrical grids and produce your own energy for self-consumption or feed it back into the grid.

SolutionsSection.description: Explore our range of innovative renewable energy technologies

bipv.title: BIPV Solutions
bipv.subtitle: Building Integrated Photovoltaics
bipv.description: Our BIPV solutions seamlessly integrate solar technology into building materials, combining aesthetics with energy generation.

features.feature3: Customizable colors and patterns to suit your needs
features.feature4: Complies with building system standards, quick installation

technical.title: Technical Specifications
technical.spec1: Energy generation film converts 16% of visible light radiation into electrical energy
technical.spec2: Converts 6% of visible light radiation into thermal energy
technical.spec3: Low-emissivity film reflects infrared and ultraviolet rays away from the building
technical.spec4: Vacuum chamber reduces heat entry into the building interior

applications.title: Applications
applications.app4: Variety of colors, transparencies, and reflectances

photovoltaic.title: Photovoltaic Solutions
photovoltaic.subtitle: High-Efficiency Solar Panels
photovoltaic.description: Our photovoltaic solutions offer maximum energy generation with minimal space requirements, perfect for residential and commercial applications.

features.feature1: High efficiency monocrystalline and polycrystalline panels

technical.title: Technical Specifications
technical.spec2: Power output from 300W to 600W per panel
technical.spec3: Anti-reflective coating for maximum light absorption
technical.spec4: Advanced temperature coefficient for consistent performance

wind.title: Wind Energy Solutions
wind.subtitle: Harnessing the Power of Wind
wind.description: Our wind energy solutions provide reliable power generation in areas with good wind resources, complementing solar installations for 24/7 energy production.

features.feature1: Vertical and horizontal axis turbines for different environments
features.feature2: Low noise operation suitable for urban settings
features.feature3: Starts generating at low wind speeds
features.feature4: Durable design with minimal maintenance requirements

technical.title: Technical Specifications
technical.spec1: Power generation from 400W to 10kW depending on model
technical.spec2: Cut-in wind speed as low as 2.5 m/s
technical.spec3: Maximum power at wind speeds of 10-12 m/s
technical.spec4: Integrated inverter systems for grid connection

SectorsSection.title: Sectors We Serve
SectorsSection.description: Green provides sustainable energy solutions tailored to the specific needs of different sectors

public.title: Public Sector
public.subtitle: Sustainable Solutions for Governments and Public Entities
public.description: Green provides energy solutions to governments, municipalities, and other public entities to reduce costs and promote sustainability.

benefits.title: Benefits
benefits.benefit3: Improved institutional image with green projects

commercial.title: Commercial Sector
commercial.subtitle: Efficient Energy for Businesses and Stores
commercial.description: From offices to large commercial chains, we offer renewable energy solutions that optimize electricity consumption and improve business competitiveness.

benefits.title: Benefits
benefits.benefit3: Appeal to customers who value sustainability

industrial.title: Industrial Sector
industrial.subtitle: Energy Solutions for Industry
industrial.description: In the industrial sector, our renewable energy systems are ideal for manufacturing processes, production, and other operations that require large amounts of energy.

benefits.title: Benefits
benefits.benefit1: Reduced dependence on conventional energy sources
benefits.benefit2: Significant long-term savings on energy bills
benefits.benefit3: Contribution to corporate social responsibility with the environment

residential.title: Residential Sector
residential.subtitle: Sustainable Energy for Homes
residential.description: We offer customized renewable energy solutions for homes, helping families reduce electricity costs while contributing to a greener planet.

benefits.title: Benefits
benefits.benefit3: Energy independence and greater stability during power outages

agricultural.title: Agricultural Sector
agricultural.subtitle: Energy for the Agricultural Sector
agricultural.description: Green's energy solutions are perfect for farms and agribusiness companies, where energy efficiency is key to business success and profitability.

benefits.title: Benefits
benefits.benefit1: Autonomous energy generation for irrigation, crop processing, and other equipment
benefits.benefit3: Green solution that respects the natural environment
